g.text: Lives inside Roblox Studio on your computer

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Roblox Studio plugin UI design')
sendPrompt('How does script injection into Roblox Studio work?')
sendPrompt('How does the Roblox plugin send HTTP requests?')

g.text: Hosted on Railway / Render / your PC — bridges Roblox to OpenAI

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Express router do in the backend?')
sendPrompt('What is prompt engineering for Roblox Lua generation?')
sendPrompt('How does the backend validate AI-generated Lua code?')

g.text: The AI brain — understands your command and generates Roblox Lua

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should the system prompt say for Roblox Lua generation?')
sendPrompt('How does GPT-4o generate valid Roblox Lua scripts?')
sendPrompt('How do we extract clean Lua code from the GPT response?')

g.text: AI output automatically inserted into your Roblox project

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a Roblox plugin insert scripts into ServerScriptService?')
sendPrompt('How can an AI plugin auto-generate Roblox maps and terrain?')
sendPrompt('How should the Roblox plugin handle errors from the AI?')
